item.title: First reading, referred to Postsecondary Education & Workforce.
item.description: First reading, referred to Postsecondary Education & Workforce.
item.guid: 2026-01-22/First reading, referred to Postsecondary Education & Workforce.

item.title: 👍Melissa Beard - Council of Presidents
item.description: Melissa Beard signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Council of Presidents.

item.title: 👍💵Morgan Hickel - University of Washington
item.description: Morgan Hickel signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent University of Washington. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Nora Selander - Western Washington University
item.description: Nora Selander signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Western Washington University. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Bill Lyne - United Faculty of Washington State
item.description: Bill Lyne signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent United Faculty of Washington State.

item.title: 👍Amy Morrison - Lake WA Institute of Technology
item.description: Amy Morrison signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Lake WA Institute of Technology.

item.title: 👍Arlen Harris - WA State Board for Community & Technical Colleges
item.description: Arlen Harris signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA State Board for Community & Technical Colleges.

item.title: 👍Beth Ebel - Council of Faculty - UW Faculty Leg Rep
item.description: Beth Ebel signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Council of Faculty - UW Faculty Leg Rep.

item.title: 👍Matthew Altman - Council of Faculty - CWU Faculty Leg Rep
item.description: Matthew Altman signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Council of Faculty - CWU Faculty Leg Rep.

item.title: 👍Sam Ligon - Council of Faculty - EWU Faculty Leg Rep
item.description: Sam Ligon signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Council of Faculty - EWU Faculty Leg Rep.

item.title: 👍💵Jacqui Cain - American Federation of Teachers (AFT-WA)
item.description: Jacqui Cain signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent American Federation of Teachers (AFT-WA). They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Suzanne Southerland - Chair, Washington Education Association (WEA) Higher Education
item.description: Suzanne Southerland signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Chair, Washington Education Association (WEA) Higher Education.

item.title: 👍💵Sienna Jarrard - WA Student Association
item.description: Sienna Jarrard signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA Student Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍John Carmichael - President, The Evergreen State College
item.description: John Carmichael signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent President, The Evergreen State College.
